=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
The Palladium
Downstairs
Worcester, MA
August 2, 2002

Unknown origin. Very good sound. Drop on first track just before the music. Tiny click at the start of "Tangled Up In Blue". Drop between the cdr.

Disk 1 (66:00.38)

1. Humming Bird
2. My Back Pages
3. It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding)
4. To Ramona
5. Tombstone Blues
6. Standing In The Doorway
7. High Water (For Charley Patton)
8. Watching The River Flow
9. Masters Of War
10.Don't Think Twice, It's All Right
11.Tangled Up In Blue

Disk 2 (57:39.35)

12.Summer Days
13.Never Gonna Be The Same Again
14.Drifter's Escape
15.Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat
16.Like A Rolling Stone
17.Honest With Me
18.Blowin' In The Wind
19.All Along The Watchtower


Concert # 1431 of The Never-Ending Tour. First concert of the 2002 US Summer Tour. 2002 concert # 48.

Concert # 32 with the 13th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

1–4, 9-11, 18 acoustic with the band.
6, 9, 14, 18 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
2 Larry Campbell (fiddle).
3 Larry Campbell (cittern).
3, 9 Charlie Sexton (dobro).
4 Larry Campbell (mandolin).
5, 8 Larry Campbell (steel guitar).
12 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
17 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).
1, 18 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals
